projectDescription: A Python implementation of the classic 2048 tile-merging puzzle game, available as both a desktop Tkinter app and a Flask-powered web application.
keyFeatures: Desktop GUI using Python Tkinter with keyboard controls (Arrow keys and WASD)
Web version powered by Flask with a JavaScript frontend
Score and high score tracking across gameplay sessions
Dynamic tile coloring based on tile values
Game over detection with replay prompt
New Game / Reset functionality in both versions
publicApiSurface: GET / — Serves the web game interface (index.html)
POST /move — Accepts a direction (left/right/up/down) and returns updated grid, score, and game_over status
POST /reset — Resets the game state and returns the new board and score
Game2048.__init__() — Initializes a new game with a 4x4 grid and two random tiles
Game2048.move(direction) — Executes a move in the given direction and adds a new tile
Game2048.game_over() — Returns True if no valid moves remain
Game2048.add_new_tile() — Places a new 2 or 4 tile on a random empty cell
Game2048.reset_game() / new_game() — Resets the board and score
